overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a woman in a long dark dress walking through a foggy, eerie forest at dusk. The environment transitions from a stone pathway under a gnarled tree archway to open grassy fields with scattered lantern posts and ancient trees, creating a haunting, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway under gnarled tree archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up stone steps beneath a massive twisted tree archway in the mist

entered.detail: massive twisted dead tree forming a natural arch over the path
weathered stone steps and pathway leading upward
low stone wall running alongside the right side of the path
leafless twisted trees scattered in the foggy background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a third-person view following a woman in a long dress ascending stone steps beneath a massive gnarled tree archway. The environment is foggy and enclosed, with stone walls lining the path and dead trees visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy field with scattered lantern posts

events.description: exits stone pathway into open grassy field with wider visibility
passes a lit lantern post on the left providing warm light in the fog

agents.ego_description: walking through open grass field toward a large ancient tree visible in the distance

entered.detail: open field with tall grass and scattered white wildflowers
tall black lamppost with warm glowing light
massive gnarled tree with twisted branches dominating the center horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stone pathway into a wide-open foggy field. She passes a lit lantern post on the left as she walks toward a massive ancient tree in the distance. The ground transitions from stone to grass, and the space opens up significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing dominated by a massive gnarled tree

events.description: passes closely by the large central tree on the left side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive ancient tree and continuing through the misty field toward distant lights

entered.detail: low crumbling stone wall partially covered in moss

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the massive ancient tree, which moves from the center of the frame to the left as she walks by. The environment remains an open grassy field with scattered dead trees and occasional stone ruins visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching evergreen forest on rolling hills

events.description: evergreen pine trees become visible on the distant hills through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking toward a denser forest area with evergreen trees visible on the rolling hills ahead

entered.detail: dense forest of evergreen pine trees covering the distant hills
faint warm lights visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open field as the landscape transitions to reveal evergreen forests on the rolling hills in the distance. The large ancient tree is left behind, and the environment suggests an approach toward a denser wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, stone-lined passage into a vast, fog-shrouded open landscape. It begins by following a woman in a long dress as she ascends stone steps beneath a massive gnarled tree archway, surrounded by enclosing walls and mist. As she emerges from the pathway, the environment opens significantly, shifting from stone to grass as she passes a lit lantern post and heads toward a distant ancient tree. The camera continues past this massive tree, which slides to the left of the frame to reveal a wide field dotted with dead trees and scattered stone ruins. Finally, the landscape expands further across rolling hills, leaving the ancient tree behind as the view opens toward dense evergreen forests in the distance.
